M-001.NAME: backend-core
M-001.owns: settings, security (JWT, password hashing, Fernet encryption, token blacklist), DB sessions, dependency injection, admin bootstrap, topology bootstrap, database migrations, AWG stealth profile settings, anti-abuse runtime settings, verified-registration email settings, and MTProto provisioning settings

exports.fn-settings: Runtime configuration values and environment parsing
exports.fn-get-fernet: Fernet encryption with explicit DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY requirement
exports.fn-migrations: Database migration helpers extracted from database.py
exports.fn-awg-profile-settings: Validated environment settings for CLIENT_PROFILE and RELAY_PROFILE obfuscation values
exports.fn-anti-abuse-settings: Validated ANTI_ABUSE_* mode, scan interval, history window, ping-pong window and cooldown values
exports.fn-email-verification-settings: EMAIL_PROVIDER, RESEND_API_KEY, RESEND_API_URL, EMAIL_FROM, verification TTL, provider timeout, SMTP credentials, verification URL base, allow/deny/disposable domain knobs, and DNS guard toggle
exports.fn-mtproto-settings: MTPROTO_BASE_DOMAIN, MTPROTO_PROXY_PORT, MTPROTO_BASE_SECRET_HEX, MTPROTO_SECRET_SALT, MTPROTO_SNI_PREFIX, and MTPROTO_ROTATION_MARKER validation with blank optional secrets normalized to unset
exports.fn-edge-domain-settings: EDGE_PUBLIC_DOMAIN, EDGE_CANONICAL_HOST, EDGE_TLS_CERTIFICATE_PATH, EDGE_TLS_CERTIFICATE_KEY_PATH, EDGE_TLS_CERTIFICATE_MODE, and EDGE_SHARED_443_ENABLED validation

disaster-recovery-role.role-1: Phase-22 application validation must prove settings, database sessions, Redis/token-blacklist behavior, admin bootstrap assumptions, and encryption keys are restored before cutover.
disaster-recovery-role.role-2: Health/auth smoke evidence must not print secrets or raw environment values.

M-001.hotspot: H-011: Token blacklist depends on Redis — graceful degradation must not break auth
H-014: Admin audit middleware must not log sensitive bodies or tokens
H-026: Email provider secrets and verification tokens must never leak through settings-driven logs or errors
H-030: MTProto base secret and salt must stay runtime-only and never appear in logs or persisted assignment rows
H-032: krotpn.xyz domain TLS and shared 443 settings must not leak secrets or create unsafe production claims before trusted wildcard TLS is ready

phase-36-plan.step-1: Keep Resend settings env-backed and validated by backend Settings without logging API keys or raw provider payloads.
phase-36-plan.step-2: Support deploy-generated EMAIL_PROVIDER=resend, RESEND_API_KEY, RESEND_API_URL, EMAIL_FROM, and EMAIL_VERIFICATION_URL_BASE values for production registration.

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-17: Clean VPS Phase-35 hotfix normalized blank MTProto secret env values to None so backend startup can degrade MTProto provisioning instead of crashing normal KrotPN runtime.
